summary: Iteration 21 - All 4 bugfixes verified and working: (1) Category removal confirmation dialog, (2) More dropdown on leaderboard, (3) Match estimation with settings_used and top-K overhead, (4) Manual matches defaults to estimated remaining instead of hardcoded 50. All 6 backend tests passed, all 4 frontend UI tests passed.

backend: estimated_weekly_matches includes top-K overhead (320 vs 220 base for cs.DC)
Settings are consistent across all category estimates
estimated_matches_remaining provides sensible default for manual matches (min(est, 100) or 20)
GET /api/categories returns 6 active categories including cs.GT
frontend: More dropdown button visible on leaderboard with 6 categories
More dropdown opens correctly showing cs.GT (Game Theory)
More dropdown closes when clicking outside (moreCatsRef click-outside handler works)
Manual matches input defaults to 11 (estimated_matches_remaining), not hardcoded 50
Category removal button shows confirmation dialog before removal
Confirmation dialog displays category ID in the warning message
Confirmation dialog has Cancel and Remove buttons with data-testid
Cancel button closes dialog without removing the category

seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing production data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified 4 bugfixes. Active categories: cs.RO, cs.DC, econ.GN, physics.comp-ph, q-bio.BM, cs.GT (6 total). The More dropdown on leaderboard now uses moreCatsRef for click-outside handling and works correctly. Category removal shows confirmation dialog with confirmRemove state. Manual matches input defaults to min(estimated_matches_remaining, 100) instead of hardcoded 50. The category-estimate endpoint now includes settings_used field with min_matches_per_paper, top_k_focus, ci_target, and the weekly_matches estimate includes top-K overhead.

confirmation_dialog.details: confirmRemove state in AdminCategories.jsx triggers overlay dialog with Cancel/Remove buttons

more_dropdown_ui.details: moreCatsRef + click-outside handler properly closes dropdown when clicking outside

match_estimation.details: category-estimate endpoint returns settings_used field, weekly_matches includes top-K overhead

manual_matches_default.details: AdminPage.jsx sets manualMatches to min(progress.estimated_matches_remaining, 100) or 20
